# OpenSIN Web Surface Plan - Full Context

## Purpose

This repository is the canonical planning layer for OpenSIN-AI web surfaces.
It exists to avoid scattered lists of domains and subpages across multiple repos.

## What it contains

- A machine-readable registry of web surfaces.
- A human-readable inventory.
- A domain/repo/deploy matrix.
- A governance board with best practices.
- Validation and generation scripts.

## Canonical principles

- Registry-first.
- Generated views second.
- Unknowns must be labeled.
- Subpages are grouped by route prefix.
- Every live surface needs an owner, purpose, and status.

## Main surfaces tracked

- opensin.ai — marketing and SEO.
- chat.opensin.ai — authenticated app and dashboard.
- my.opensin.ai — premium marketplace.
- docs.opensin.ai — documentation.
- blog.opensin.ai — editorial and announcements.
- api.opensin.ai — backend and billing API.
- opensin.ai/agents — public agent catalog.
- chat.opensin.ai/agents/sin-stripe — Stripe agent card.

## Repository links

- GitHub: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-Web-Surface-Plan
- Registry: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-Web-Surface-Plan/blob/main/registry/web-surfaces.json
- Docs: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-Web-Surface-Plan/tree/main/docs
